name: hmip-plugin-fusionsolar
description: Homematic IP HCU plugin to read and control a Huawei Sun2000 PV system locally via Modbus TCP, with optional FusionSolar cloud fallback.

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/hcu/client.js && node --check src/sun2000/poller.js && node --check src/dashboard/server.js
